title: metrosideros polymorpha var. glabrifolia
intro: Metrosideros polymorpha var. glabrifolia, also known as the 'Smooth-leaf Northern Rātā', is a variety of the native New Zealand tree Metrosideros polymorpha, recognized for its glabrous, elliptical leaves. The plant has been used in traditional Māori medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Metrosideros polymorpha var. glabrifolia include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and prevent infection. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through the extraction of its leaves and bark, which can be made into teas, infusions, or dried for later use in various herbal preparations.
